description: Consolidation Phase: Dynamic Capture Deprecation — JSON-primary mode, dynamic capture reclassified as recovery-only
archivedPhases: Child folders 001-005 contain full spec documentation from all 5 superseded/consolidated phases

reviewOutcomes.002-contamination-detection: keep — pure quality gates (lexical scrubber, V8/V9, post-render), no dynamic-capture dependency
reviewOutcomes.005-confidence-calibration: keep — type-system enrichment (dual confidence on DecisionRecord), no dynamic-capture dependency
reviewOutcomes.008-signal-extraction: keep — source-agnostic semantic extraction (topics, triggers), no dynamic-capture dependency
reviewOutcomes.013-auto-detection-fixes: reframed — Priority 2.7 (git-status) and 3.5 (session-activity) documented as dynamic-capture optimizations that lose primary value under JSON-mode
reviewOutcomes.019-source-capabilities-and-structured-p: reframed — structured-preference framing updated for JSON-primary reality; capability registry infrastructure retained
reviewOutcomes.020-live-proof-and-parity-hardening: reframed — narrowed from multi-mode parity proof to JSON-mode verification at scale across 5 CLIs

exitCriteria.qualityParity: No critical memory-quality regressions vs capture baseline
exitCriteria.edgeCases: Interrupted sessions, delegated agents, multi-CLI, partial saves all handled
exitCriteria.recoveryMechanism: Crash-recovery break-glass path documented and tested

decisions.title: Drop dynamic capture → JSON-only mode
decisions.chosen: Option 2: JSON-primary, dynamic capture as recovery-only
decisions.rationale: AI has strictly better information about its own session than any DB query. 39 agent dispatches + 8 deep-research iterations could not fix the fundamental session-selection heuristic problem. Wrong-session capture just happened in production.
